14.reason: [Loop condition i<k-2 may skip the last one or two characters, potentially missing the final operation (especially if input ends without trailing space).]

27.reason: [If the number is at the end of input and not followed by a space (e.g., before -1), this loop runs past valid data, causing undefined behavior or incorrect parsing.]
